name: Rhubarb Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread each slice of bread with 1 teaspoon of butter.
2. Cut the buttered bread into 1 inch cubes.
3. Combine sugar and cinnamon in a bowl.
4. Arrange half of the rhubarb pieces in the bottom of a greased 8-inch baking dish.
5. Top with half of the bread cubes and half of the sugar mixture.
6. Repeat steps 4 and 5.
7. Dot remaining butter over the pudding.
8. Cover and bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
